reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the current CLI guide claims covered by focused doctor named-adapter and refresh-plan overwrite tests.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names deterministic doctor adapter selection and CLI guidance behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused doctor tests showing plain doctor does not guess a named adapter, CLI help preserving --adapter-name guidance, and explicit named-adapter validation guidance.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep named-adapter doctor guidance and explicit adapter validation separate from any future auto-selection behavior.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names a deterministic CLI guard that prevents refresh-plan packets from overwriting saved claim-state paths.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the refresh-plan overwrite regression test: discover claims with --previous and --refresh-plan refuses to overwrite a saved claim-state path, and the saved packet remains cautilus.claim_proof_plan.v1.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep refresh-plan outputs separate from configured saved claim-state paths.
